title: Node 24, TypeScript 7, ESM, Dependencies, and Emitted Artifacts · Changed-Schema Lab
summary: An independent municipal service owner supplies a different origin, markup family, dynamic boundary, accessibility need, resource budget, and injected failure and transfers node 24, typescript 7, esm, dependencies, and emitted artifacts into a changed reproducible source-to-emitted crawler repository. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of reproducible source-to-emitted crawler repository with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, ex…
objectives: Pin Node 24.18.0, TypeScript 7.0.2 and the TypeScript 6.0.2 compatibility API, ESM semantics, package manager, and supported platforms.
Pin Cheerio 1.2.0, robots-parser 3.0.1, p-limit 7.3.0, csv-stringify 6.8.1, Playwright 1.61.1, and axe-core 4.12.1 with provenance and license review.
Bind strict source, declarations, maps, generated fixtures, package exports, emitted JavaScript, and startup entry to one revision.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
